Function: Provide information about whether the data is (roughly) Normally distributed
Significance: May need to be computed first for quick data check (for Normality & variance) because a lot of statistical tests have an assumption that the data fit a Normal distribution.

Function: Shows the frequency of occurrence for values in set ranges
Examines the relationship between two numerical values.
Significance: Residuals between the observed value & expected value on the fitted line can be computed. See the R code on the page.

Function: Used to look at count data.
